note: A-03: I heard coughing near the middle fan row again this morning. Birds looked quieter than usual and did not move much when staff walked through.
B-01: The back side of the house felt warmer than the entrance. Several birds were panting after the temperature started going up.
C-02: The litter under the water line is wet and sticky. It looks like one or two drinker nipples may still be dripping.
A-01: Feed pans had more feed left than usual. The birds came to the line slowly, but water intake looked normal.
D-04: Dead bird pickup was higher than yesterday, mostly near the rear half of the house. I could not see an obvious equipment problem.
B-03: The air smelled sharp inside the house. Litter near the drinker line was damp, and the smell got stronger after a few minutes inside.
C-05: One fan section made a rough sound during the afternoon check. Airflow felt weaker near the wall-side corner.
A-06: Egg count was lower than expected again today. The belt looked fine, but the back rows seemed lighter than normal.
D-02: A few birds were sitting in the corner and barely reacted when staff walked by. No clear injuries were visible.
B-05: One feed line section did not fill evenly. Birds crowded around the nearby pans while some pans stayed almost empty.
